archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Premium Academic E-commerce

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

spacing.general: Use generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.
spacing.sections: py-20 md:py-32 for main sections to give breathing room.

layout_patterns.grids: Use mobile-first grid-cols-1, md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for product grids.
layout_patterns.alignment: Left-align dense text and product info for readability.

cards.padding: p-0 for product cards (image full width top), p-6 for textual cards

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 hover:border-blue-600 text-slate-700 hover:text-blue-600 px-6 py-3 transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:border-transparent px-4 py-3

badges.style: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold bg-blue-100 text-blue-700

animations.hover: Hover lifts: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg. Transition duration 300ms ease-out.
animations.page_load: Fade up entrance: translate-y-4 to translate-y-0, opacity 0 to 1.
animations.cart: Slide in from right for cart drawer. Staggered list items.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Blue-600 on White is safe.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button')

hero.description: Teenager studying at home, focused, representing Indian students.

abstract_backgrounds.description: Library study background for about or contact pages.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using a modern Premium Academic theme. Use pure white backgrounds and deep cobalt blue accents.
Follow the rounded-2xl border-radius for cards and rounded-full for buttons as explicitly requested.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the media section of this JSON.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cart actions) have appropriate data-testid attributes.
Build the hero section with a strong 'Stationery that studies harder with you' message. Left align or center based on visual balance. Ensure good contrast.
Populate the Popular Products section with the exact 10 sample products provided in the media arrays.
Implement clear Shadcn UI driven forms for the checkout and OTP flows.
Include hover states (-translate-y-1 and shadow-lg) on product cards to make the UI feel premium and tactile.
